name: Caribbean Jerk Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 6 lean pork loin or pork rib chops, (5/8 inches thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except pork in a blender. Cover and blend until well blended.
2. Reserve half of the marinade for basting. Cover and refrigerate the remaining marinade.
3. Trim excess fat from the pork.
4. Place the pork in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
5. Pour the reserved marinade over the pork. Cover and refrigerate for at least 12 hours, but no longer than 24 hours.
6. Heat coals or gas grill.
7. Remove the pork from the marinade and discard it.
8. Grill the pork 4 to 5 inches from medium heat for 8-11 minutes, turning frequently and brushing with the reserved marinade until medium doneness (160) and slightly pink when cut near the bone.
9. Discard any remaining basting marinade.
10. Makes 6 servings.
